hero.title: Your strategic partner to import from China to the whole world
hero.subtitle: GZ-EMPIRE BAKALA TRADING CO., LTD assists entrepreneurs, merchants, and businesses in sourcing, buying, logistics, and importing goods from China.
services.title: Complete solutions for your business success
services.subtitle: From supplier sourcing to final delivery, we cover the entire import supply chain.
gallery.title: GZ-EMPIRE in Action
gallery.subtitle: Discover our team, our offices in Guangzhou, and our daily operations on the field.
services.sourcing.template: Hello, I would like to get assistance with supplier sourcing and purchasing goods in China for the following need: [Describe your products and quantity]
services.maritime.template: Hello, I would like to request a quote for ocean freight (FCL/LCL) from China. Here are my cargo details: [Volume, weight, destination port]
services.air.template: Hello, I would like to request a quote for an urgent air freight shipment from China. Here are the details: [Product type, weight, requested delivery date]
services.visa.template: Hello, I plan to travel to China for business and would like to get your assistance for my visa and commercial invitation letter.
services.customs.template: Hello, I would like to get assistance with customs clearance and importing my goods from China.
services.vip.template: Hello, I want to travel to China to visit suppliers and would like to benefit from your VIP support service (airport pickup, interpreter, transport).
about.title:
International trade excellence
at the service of your success
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner based in Guangzhou to secure, negotiate, and ship your goods from China to the rest of the world.
about.feature1.title: Direct Factory Sourcing
about.feature1.text: Direct negotiations to maximize your margins without intermediaries.
about.feature2.title: Strict Quality Control
about.feature2.text: Rigorous physical inspections and video reports before shipping.
about.feature3.title: Local Multilingual Support
about.feature3.text: Bilingual team in Guangzhou to eliminate language barriers.
about.feature4.title: End-to-End Logistics
about.feature4.text: From the warehouse in Guangzhou to the final delivery at your door.
about.pillar.expertise.template: Hello GZ-Empire, I would like to benefit from your in-depth knowledge of the Chinese market for my import project. Can you help me?
about.pillar.reseau.template: Hello GZ-Empire, I would like to know more about your network of over 500 verified suppliers in China and how you qualify factories.
about.pillar.accompagnement.template: Hello GZ-Empire, I need comprehensive and personalized support from order placement in China to final delivery at my warehouse.
about.pillar.transparence.template: Hello GZ-Empire, transparency and real-time tracking are crucial for my business. How do you track and report order progress?
about.pillar.rapidite.template: Hello GZ-Empire, I have tight shipping deadlines for my imports from China. How do you optimize and speed up delivery times?
